title: frumentum repens
intro: Frumentum repens, also known as creeping rye grass or couch grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, Africa, and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of frumentum repens include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Frumentum repens can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
